name: Bleeding
plain: Loses a small amount of HP every round from a bleeding wound.

name: Poisoned
plain: Loses HP every round; multiple doses stack on top of each other.

name: Burning
plain: Takes fire damage every round and has reduced protection against flames.

name: Stunned
plain: Skips the next turn and cannot act while the stun lasts.

name: Hasted
plain: Gets extra actions per round, acting more frequently than normal.

name: Rallied
plain: Deals more damage on every hit while this effect is active.

name: Barrier
plain: A protective shield absorbs incoming damage before HP is reduced.

name: Blocking
plain: Has a higher chance to block incoming attacks with a shield or weapon.

name: Deflecting
plain: The next hit that lands is partially or fully turned aside.

name: Enchanted
plain: Weapon carries a magical charge, dealing 25% more magic damage.

name: Slowed
plain: Acts less often each round, taking longer between turns.

name: Taunt Totem
plain: A totem draws enemy attacks toward itself, protecting the rest of the party.

name: Regenerating
plain: Recovers a small amount of HP at the start of each round.

name: Marked
plain: Receives extra damage from all sources while the mark is active.

name: Blinded
plain: Vision is impaired; attacks miss far more often than usual.

name: Soul-Bound
plain: A soul link connects this target to the caster; effects on one may transfer to the other.

name: Cursed
plain: A dark curse weakens this target, applying a mix of harmful effects.

name: Silenced
plain: Cannot cast spells or use any abilities that require speaking or channeling.

name: Disarmed
plain: Weapon has been knocked away; physical weapon attacks are unavailable.

name: Rooted
plain: Held in place and cannot move or change position in the fight.

name: Holy Fire
plain: Sacred flames scorch this unholy target, dealing light damage every round.

name: Frozen
plain: Encased in ice — cannot act this round.

name: Confused
plain: Disoriented — has a 50% chance to skip their next action.

name: Thorns
plain: Returns damage to any attacker that lands a hit.

name: Dazed
plain: Disoriented — attacks have a much harder time finding their mark (-25% hit chance) for the duration.
